name: Scissor Girl's Weed Crisis
short_description: This is a game that can be played alone or with two players. Players play as a girl using scissors to fight against weed enemies. They need to avoid the attacks of weed enemies, find opportunities to attack them, and eliminate all enemies.
detailed_description:
关注我们

qq交流群：160196732 B站：https://space.bilibili.com/3493135049033939


About the Game

Players take on the role of a girl using scissors to resist weed enemies. There are currently over twenty types of weed enemies in the game, each with their own attack methods and ranges. Humans and plants track players, while other weeds move randomly or remain stationary. Scissors rotate around the player, and the player needs to avoid attacks from weed enemies, find opportunities to attack enemies, and eliminate all enemies. The game can be played alone or with two players. In the two player mode, the health of ordinary enemies doubles, and the number of man eating flowers and plants becomes two. After the enemy's health drops to zero, they will not immediately die, but will transform into soul form and can still attack players. When all enemies transform into soul form, the game wins. The game has a blocking mechanism, where players can press the attack button to block enemy attacks at the moment they are about to be attacked. The game is divided into normal mode (enemies move randomly) and weed mode (enemies do not move). The game can challenge fixed levels, select enemies to challenge, and generate random enemies.

supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Korean
